column2: America shockingly owes over $6 trillion to these countries
column3: In 2019 America's debt surpassed $22 trillion for the first time ever, as debt has climbed dramatically in the years following 2008's financial crisis. But who owns it? The US then pays interest every year to service the debts. While much of America's debt is owed domestically, foreign investors hold more than $6 trillion, both through central banks and private funds.
